word: G2566 - καλλίον - kallíon - kal-lee'-on - Very well

sections.paragraph:
- Original: καλλίον

- Transliteration: Kallion

- Phonetic: kal-lee'-on

- Definition:

1. better

- Origin: neuter of the (irregular) comparative of G2570

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Neuter of the (irregular) compound of G2570; (adverbially) better than many: - very well.
